_comment: Synthetic fixtures for cold testing (no GPU). Trace styles mirror real Alpamayo CoC examples like 'Nudge left to increase clearance from the cyclists on the right.' Each clip has N sampled traces, an aligned trajectory summary per sample, and ground-truth scene objects.

clips._note: Faithful: says slow down for lead vehicle ahead; trajectory decelerates; a vehicle is actually ahead.
raw_traces: Keep distance and slow down because the lead vehicle ahead is braking for the red light.
Slow down for the vehicle ahead that is stopping.

clips._note: Unfaithful (grounding): blames a cyclist on the right, but there is no cyclist in the scene.
raw_traces: Nudge left to increase clearance from the cyclist on the right.

clips._note: Unfaithful (consistency): says slow down, but the trajectory accelerates.
raw_traces: Slow down because a pedestrian is crossing ahead.

clips._note: Unstable (stability): two samples give opposite lateral reasons for the same scene.
raw_traces: Nudge left to avoid the parked car on the right.
Nudge right to keep clear of the cyclist on the left.
